creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
In recently completed <http://beefy13.nyi.freebsd.org/build.html?mastername=131i386-quarterly&build=15aa9ea6ac29>: 

* the reason for the skip of conky-1.19.0 is hs-pandoc-3.1.1

* the reason for ignorance of hs-pandoc-3.1.1 is: 

> is marked as broken: basement-0.0.15 package doesn't compile on i386
